items.title: S01E01 - Should Auld Acquaintance
items.summary: No longer able to say "Please Sir!" when they have a problem, Form 5C from Fenn Street Secondary Modern are out in the cold hard world. But school friendships die hard and the mob determine to preserve their group identity.

infolabels.title: Should Auld Acquaintance
infolabels.plot: No longer able to say "Please Sir!" when they have a problem, Form 5C from Fenn Street Secondary Modern are out in the cold hard world. But school friendships die hard and the mob determine to preserve their group identity.

items.title: S01E02 - The Start Of Something Big
items.summary: Things are not going too smoothly for Eric and Sharon. While Eric is busy having a brush with the Law, Sharon realises that there are other fish in the sea. It is then that ace "tec" Frankie Abbott comes onto the scene - on his first case!

infolabels.title: The Start Of Something Big
infolabels.plot: Things are not going too smoothly for Eric and Sharon. While Eric is busy having a brush with the Law, Sharon realises that there are other fish in the sea. It is then that ace "tec" Frankie Abbott comes onto the scene - on his first case!

items.title: S01E03 - Leave It To Me, Darling
items.summary: The Fenn Street Gang get a new member - Bernard Hedges

infolabels.title: Leave It To Me, Darling
infolabels.plot: The Fenn Street Gang get a new member - Bernard Hedges

items.title: S01E04 - Horses For Courses
items.summary: Dennis knows who his real friends are - or does he? Things come to a head when Maureen takes him to a party

infolabels.title: Horses For Courses
infolabels.plot: Dennis knows who his real friends are - or does he? Things come to a head when Maureen takes him to a party

items.title: S01E05 - Meet The Wizard
items.summary: Penny (Bernard's wife) decides that a woman's place is certainly not at home but the problem is keeping her job a secret from Bernard, who has rather old-fashioned views on women. Because, when at last he does get off the dole, his new job brings him into contact with all sorts of people.

infolabels.title: Meet The Wizard
infolabels.plot: Penny (Bernard's wife) decides that a woman's place is certainly not at home but the problem is keeping her job a secret from Bernard, who has rather old-fashioned views on women. Because, when at last he does get off the dole, his new job brings him into contact with all sorts of people.

items.title: S01E06 - Distant Horizons
items.summary: The course of Duffy's and Sharon's true love never did run very smoothly, but as they grow older it becomes positively bumpy. When Sharon meets a sensitive student and Duffy gets his first taste of real competition, something just has to give . . .

infolabels.title: Distant Horizons
infolabels.plot: The course of Duffy's and Sharon's true love never did run very smoothly, but as they grow older it becomes positively bumpy. When Sharon meets a sensitive student and Duffy gets his first taste of real competition, something just has to give . . .

items.title: S01E07 - Change Partners
items.summary: Bernard still waits to start work at London University, while at home the bills keep on piling up. When a friend suggests a lucrative part-time job, he jumps at the chance but the kind of work involved makes him wished that he had looked before he leaped . . .

infolabels.title: Change Partners
infolabels.plot: Bernard still waits to start work at London University, while at home the bills keep on piling up. When a friend suggests a lucrative part-time job, he jumps at the chance but the kind of work involved makes him wished that he had looked before he leaped . . .

items.title: S01E08 - The Thin Yellow Line
items.summary: When the career of "Hank" Abbott, private detective come to an inglorious end, the British Army opens its arms to a new recruit. Had the Army realised what it was getting, the open arms might well have become clenched fists.

infolabels.title: The Thin Yellow Line
infolabels.plot: When the career of "Hank" Abbott, private detective come to an inglorious end, the British Army opens its arms to a new recruit. Had the Army realised what it was getting, the open arms might well have become clenched fists.

items.title: S01E09 - All Mod Cons
items.summary: When Dennis leaves home he finds he's taken on more than he can handle. So has Eric. He's taken on Peter Craven in an optimistic attempt to contemplate a decorating job.

infolabels.title: All Mod Cons
infolabels.plot: When Dennis leaves home he finds he's taken on more than he can handle. So has Eric. He's taken on Peter Craven in an optimistic attempt to contemplate a decorating job.

items.title: S01E10 - These Foolish Things
items.summary: The final dust-up between Duffy and Sharon; Abbott in hospital with a stab wound; Dunstable's flat as a rendezvous . . .

infolabels.title: These Foolish Things
infolabels.plot: The final dust-up between Duffy and Sharon; Abbott in hospital with a stab wound; Dunstable's flat as a rendezvous . . .

items.title: S01E11 - Rough Justice
items.summary: Dennis falls into bad company and is introduced to Russian bitter. The result is an appearance in the Magistrate's Court. Bad enough, you may think, but when Duffy, Craven and Mr Smith (one of their old teachers) appear for the defence, things go from bad to worse.

infolabels.title: Rough Justice
infolabels.plot: Dennis falls into bad company and is introduced to Russian bitter. The result is an appearance in the Magistrate's Court. Bad enough, you may think, but when Duffy, Craven and Mr Smith (one of their old teachers) appear for the defence, things go from bad to worse.

items.title: S01E12 - Who Was That Lady?
items.summary: Duffy is feeling the strain of separation from Sharon but is not above chatting up a bird - especially when her father is in a position to put a bit of business his way.

infolabels.title: Who Was That Lady?
infolabels.plot: Duffy is feeling the strain of separation from Sharon but is not above chatting up a bird - especially when her father is in a position to put a bit of business his way.

items.title: S01E13 - Kill Or Cure
items.summary: Maureen is a bundle of nerves as she waits for her "O" level results which will affect her nursing career. What better cure for the nerves than a nice date with a "nice chap"? So Duffy and Craven, with the best will in the world, pick the "nice chap". But where there is a will there is not always a way.

infolabels.title: Kill Or Cure
infolabels.plot: Maureen is a bundle of nerves as she waits for her "O" level results which will affect her nursing career. What better cure for the nerves than a nice date with a "nice chap"? So Duffy and Craven, with the best will in the world, pick the "nice chap". But where there is a will there is not always a way.

items.title: S01E14 - When Did You Last See Your Father?
items.summary: Until now, Frankie Abbott's mother has kept the awful secret of his father private. But Frankie is growing up - even if he is 10 years late about it - and his questions finally reveal the skeleton in mum's cupboard.

infolabels.title: When Did You Last See Your Father?
infolabels.plot: Until now, Frankie Abbott's mother has kept the awful secret of his father private. But Frankie is growing up - even if he is 10 years late about it - and his questions finally reveal the skeleton in mum's cupboard.

items.title: S01E15 - A Fair Swap
items.summary: The happiest day of a girl's life is her wedding day - that is unless she's being married from the Duffy household! The whole affair of the wedding of Duffy's cousin, Deborah, however, is somewhat complicated by Maureen's kidnapping, and the assistance of Frankie "nurse" Abbott.

infolabels.title: A Fair Swap
infolabels.plot: The happiest day of a girl's life is her wedding day - that is unless she's being married from the Duffy household! The whole affair of the wedding of Duffy's cousin, Deborah, however, is somewhat complicated by Maureen's kidnapping, and the assistance of Frankie "nurse" Abbott.

items.title: S01E16 - The Clean Weekend
items.summary: Eric and Sharon get back together and the gang have a day out at the seaside. When they decide to stay the night in a hotel, Eric and Sharon get themselves into all kinds of trouble.

infolabels.title: The Clean Weekend
infolabels.plot: Eric and Sharon get back together and the gang have a day out at the seaside. When they decide to stay the night in a hotel, Eric and Sharon get themselves into all kinds of trouble.

items.title: S01E17 - Tally Ho
items.summary: With a bit of help from Craven, Dennis Dunstable tries to make his abusive alcoholic dad turn over a new leaf.

infolabels.title: Tally Ho
infolabels.plot: With a bit of help from Craven, Dennis Dunstable tries to make his abusive alcoholic dad turn over a new leaf.

items.title: S01E18 - Horse Of The Year
items.summary: Dennis has to decide how to spend his birthday money, and spends it on a horse at an auction.

infolabels.title: Horse Of The Year
infolabels.plot: Dennis has to decide how to spend his birthday money, and spends it on a horse at an auction.

items.title: S01E19 - From Sudbury With Love
items.summary: Frankie Abbott hits town looking for a new girlfriend.

infolabels.title: From Sudbury With Love
infolabels.plot: Frankie Abbott hits town looking for a new girlfriend.

items.title: S01E20 - Who's Minding The Shop?
items.summary: A road accident means that the Fenn Street Gang become shop-keepers.

infolabels.title: Who's Minding The Shop?
infolabels.plot: A road accident means that the Fenn Street Gang become shop-keepers.

items.title: S01E21 - The Great Frock Robbers
items.summary: Sharon's job at the boutique is in jeopardy when she is blamed for not spotting a gang of shop-lifters. It seems things can't get any worse, and then Frankie gets the job of store detective . . .

infolabels.title: The Great Frock Robbers
infolabels.plot: Sharon's job at the boutique is in jeopardy when she is blamed for not spotting a gang of shop-lifters. It seems things can't get any worse, and then Frankie gets the job of store detective . . .

items.title: S02E01 - The Crunch
items.summary: Duffy discovers that running a small family business is not all beer and skittles. He can't even afford the beer!

infolabels.title: The Crunch
infolabels.plot: Duffy discovers that running a small family business is not all beer and skittles. He can't even afford the beer!

items.title: S02E02 - Smart Lad Wanted
items.summary: Bowler, the local villain who "runs everything except London Transport", offers the out-of-work Craven a job. Craven's friends warn him about getting mixed up with Bowler, but he has never been one to listen to advice that didn't suit him.

infolabels.title: Smart Lad Wanted
infolabels.plot: Bowler, the local villain who "runs everything except London Transport", offers the out-of-work Craven a job. Craven's friends warn him about getting mixed up with Bowler, but he has never been one to listen to advice that didn't suit him.

items.title: S02E03 - The Woman For Dennis
items.summary: The gang are delighted when the lonely Dennis Dunstable announces he has found a girlfriend. Then they meet the "girl" - battle-scarred and pushing 40. Sadly, it appears that Cupid may need a little correction . . .

infolabels.title: The Woman For Dennis
infolabels.plot: The gang are delighted when the lonely Dennis Dunstable announces he has found a girlfriend. Then they meet the "girl" - battle-scarred and pushing 40. Sadly, it appears that Cupid may need a little correction . . .

items.title: S02E04 - Menagerie A Trois
items.summary: Abbott's hypochondriac mother throws off her bandages when she falls for a man. Abbott's jealousy drives him from home, and he decides to inflict himself on Dennis. But Abbott and his mother deserve each other too much for the parting to be permanent.

infolabels.title: Menagerie A Trois
infolabels.plot: Abbott's hypochondriac mother throws off her bandages when she falls for a man. Abbott's jealousy drives him from home, and he decides to inflict himself on Dennis. But Abbott and his mother deserve each other too much for the parting to be permanent.

items.title: S02E05 - That Sort Of Girl
items.summary: Struggling to stay in business, Duffy needs, but cannot afford, some new ladders. Sharon enters a beauty contest to try to get enough money to buy them, but Duffy has strong views on beauty contests and Maureen has strong views on men who have strong views on beauty contests.

infolabels.title: That Sort Of Girl
infolabels.plot: Struggling to stay in business, Duffy needs, but cannot afford, some new ladders. Sharon enters a beauty contest to try to get enough money to buy them, but Duffy has strong views on beauty contests and Maureen has strong views on men who have strong views on beauty contests.

items.title: S02E06 - The Left Hand Path
items.summary: Working for the crooked Mr Bowler has brought Craven a flash car and flash clothes. Working for himself has brought Duffy packed lunches and overalls. Craven cannot resist showing off, but showing off with Bowler's money is not only silly, but also very dangerous.

infolabels.title: The Left Hand Path
infolabels.plot: Working for the crooked Mr Bowler has brought Craven a flash car and flash clothes. Working for himself has brought Duffy packed lunches and overalls. Craven cannot resist showing off, but showing off with Bowler's money is not only silly, but also very dangerous.

items.title: S02E07 - The Lady With The Lamp
items.summary: At last Maureen passes her O-levels and begins a new career as a "real" nurse. Little do the patients and the staff realise what they are in for with the arrival of a modern-day Florence Nightingale gone berserk!

infolabels.title: The Lady With The Lamp
infolabels.plot: At last Maureen passes her O-levels and begins a new career as a "real" nurse. Little do the patients and the staff realise what they are in for with the arrival of a modern-day Florence Nightingale gone berserk!

items.title: S02E08 - The Loneliest Night Of The Week
items.summary: Dennis and Frankie find contact with the opposite sex difficult. With advice from Craven and Sharon, Dennis feels that dancing lessons might be a way of making friends. Abbott, of course, has a much better idea, an idea that could lead to disaster . . .

infolabels.title: The Loneliest Night Of The Week
infolabels.plot: Dennis and Frankie find contact with the opposite sex difficult. With advice from Craven and Sharon, Dennis feels that dancing lessons might be a way of making friends. Abbott, of course, has a much better idea, an idea that could lead to disaster . . .

items.title: S02E09 - Father's Day
items.summary: Mr. Dunstable has his last drunken row with his wife - who leaves him. So he decides to move in with Dennis. But Dennis, now making sweet, if slow, progress with his girlfriend, has other ideas.

infolabels.title: Father's Day
infolabels.plot: Mr. Dunstable has his last drunken row with his wife - who leaves him. So he decides to move in with Dennis. But Dennis, now making sweet, if slow, progress with his girlfriend, has other ideas.

items.title: S02E10 - Low Noon
items.summary: Mr, Bowler likes Peter Craven working for him because he has "style". He very much wants Duffy on his payroll, too, because he has even more "style". Duffy says no, but Mr Bowler is a determined man who thinks anyone will change their mind - with a little persuasion . . .

infolabels.title: Low Noon
infolabels.plot: Mr, Bowler likes Peter Craven working for him because he has "style". He very much wants Duffy on his payroll, too, because he has even more "style". Duffy says no, but Mr Bowler is a determined man who thinks anyone will change their mind - with a little persuasion . . .

items.title: S02E11 - And Baby Makes Four
items.summary: Craven moves away from home and gets himself a flat - which he regards as a potential "come up for coffee and do you have to go home?" set-up. Then he gives a lift to a heavily-pregnant hitch-hiker, and his love-nest begins to look like a nursing home.

infolabels.title: And Baby Makes Four
infolabels.plot: Craven moves away from home and gets himself a flat - which he regards as a potential "come up for coffee and do you have to go home?" set-up. Then he gives a lift to a heavily-pregnant hitch-hiker, and his love-nest begins to look like a nursing home.

items.title: S02E12 - Is That A Proposal, Eric?
items.summary: Sharon has been Eric Duffy's girlfriend since the Third Form at fenn Street School, and she is beginning to think that she will only be his girlfriend when they are drawing their pensions. This leads Sharon to take drastic steps. Eric only takes one step - but it's a big one.

infolabels.title: Is That A Proposal, Eric?
infolabels.plot: Sharon has been Eric Duffy's girlfriend since the Third Form at fenn Street School, and she is beginning to think that she will only be his girlfriend when they are drawing their pensions. This leads Sharon to take drastic steps. Eric only takes one step - but it's a big one.

items.title: S02E13 - Private Eye, Public Nuisance
items.summary: Frankie Abbott is enjoying life on the dole, spending his days in bed and only waking occasionally to play with his new camera. This his mother meets private investigator Mr Drew and persuades him to re-employ her son.

infolabels.title: Private Eye, Public Nuisance
infolabels.plot: Frankie Abbott is enjoying life on the dole, spending his days in bed and only waking occasionally to play with his new camera. This his mother meets private investigator Mr Drew and persuades him to re-employ her son.

items.title: S02E14 - Dypsomania On Sea
items.summary: When Dennis is persuaded to take a holiday by the sea, his father goes too and takes the cure. but, much to the horror of elderly residents of a certain hotel, the sea air revives the spirits in both father and son!

infolabels.title: Dypsomania On Sea
infolabels.plot: When Dennis is persuaded to take a holiday by the sea, his father goes too and takes the cure. but, much to the horror of elderly residents of a certain hotel, the sea air revives the spirits in both father and son!

items.title: S02E15 - Is Anybody There?
items.summary: The gang go other-worldly when Maureen gets them interested in spiritualism. At a meeting held by Mr Grout, a local medium, he tells them that one of them could easily turn out to be a medium too. Abbott immediately assumes that he has psychic powers, but a surprise is in store for Maureen!

infolabels.title: Is Anybody There?
infolabels.plot: The gang go other-worldly when Maureen gets them interested in spiritualism. At a meeting held by Mr Grout, a local medium, he tells them that one of them could easily turn out to be a medium too. Abbott immediately assumes that he has psychic powers, but a surprise is in store for Maureen!

items.title: S02E16 - How To Handle A Woman
items.summary: The relationship between Craven's parents consists of Mrs Craven yelling and Mr Craven obeying. So he decides to incite his father to rebellion, and succeeds - in splitting them up!

infolabels.title: How To Handle A Woman
infolabels.plot: The relationship between Craven's parents consists of Mrs Craven yelling and Mr Craven obeying. So he decides to incite his father to rebellion, and succeeds - in splitting them up!

items.title: S02E17 - Business Deficiency
items.summary: The writing is on the wall for Eric Duffy. What he needs to get his decorating business more firmly established is to put the whole thing on a more formal footing.

infolabels.title: Business Deficiency
infolabels.plot: The writing is on the wall for Eric Duffy. What he needs to get his decorating business more firmly established is to put the whole thing on a more formal footing.

items.title: S02E18 - Absent Friends
items.summary: Duffy and Sharon's engagement is made official at last - so, of course, there has to be a party. What better time than now for the happy couple to have all their old school friends around them? Or is it?

infolabels.title: Absent Friends
infolabels.plot: Duffy and Sharon's engagement is made official at last - so, of course, there has to be a party. What better time than now for the happy couple to have all their old school friends around them? Or is it?

items.title: S03E01 - An Englishman's Home
items.summary: Duffy and Sharon are engaged and looking for a home of their own. They think they've found one but Frankie Abbott loses them the chance to buy it. Full of remorse, Abbott sets out to try and make amends.

infolabels.title: An Englishman's Home
infolabels.plot: Duffy and Sharon are engaged and looking for a home of their own. They think they've found one but Frankie Abbott loses them the chance to buy it. Full of remorse, Abbott sets out to try and make amends.

items.title: S03E02 - Mother Knows Best
items.summary: Taking a girlfriend home for the first time is always a nerve-racking experience. But whenh you have a mother like Frankie has, the confrontation is particularly difficult!

infolabels.title: Mother Knows Best
infolabels.plot: Taking a girlfriend home for the first time is always a nerve-racking experience. But whenh you have a mother like Frankie has, the confrontation is particularly difficult!

items.title: S03E03 - Alone At Last
items.summary: Wedding bells are finally ringing for Duffy and Sharon and after all the traditional marriage day hang-ups, all they want is to be alone. But fate has yet one more trick in store.

infolabels.title: Alone At Last
infolabels.plot: Wedding bells are finally ringing for Duffy and Sharon and after all the traditional marriage day hang-ups, all they want is to be alone. But fate has yet one more trick in store.

items.title: S03E04 - Making Whoopee
items.summary: Honeymoons should be unforgettable. Well, Duffy and Sharon will always remember their honeymoon in Majorca - but not for the usual reasons!

infolabels.title: Making Whoopee
infolabels.plot: Honeymoons should be unforgettable. Well, Duffy and Sharon will always remember their honeymoon in Majorca - but not for the usual reasons!

items.title: S03E05 - After The Ball
items.summary: Craven has been walking the tightrope of life too long, and naturally it is the idiot Abbott who makes him lose his balance. The question is - can Duffy provide the safety net?

infolabels.title: After The Ball
infolabels.plot: Craven has been walking the tightrope of life too long, and naturally it is the idiot Abbott who makes him lose his balance. The question is - can Duffy provide the safety net?

items.title: S03E06 - The Ant And The Grasshopper
items.summary: Duffy has taken Craven on as first assistant painter, but their industrial relationship is soon put under strain. Something has to give, and it looks as though the result might be a rise in the unemployment figures.

infolabels.title: The Ant And The Grasshopper
infolabels.plot: Duffy has taken Craven on as first assistant painter, but their industrial relationship is soon put under strain. Something has to give, and it looks as though the result might be a rise in the unemployment figures.

items.title: S03E07 - Abbott Of Arabia
items.summary: Mrs Abbott exerts her authority over Frankie once too often. It changes him into a latter-day "Red Shadow" and he gallops off with Celeste (his new girlfriend) to the registry office . . .

infolabels.title: Abbott Of Arabia
infolabels.plot: Mrs Abbott exerts her authority over Frankie once too often. It changes him into a latter-day "Red Shadow" and he gallops off with Celeste (his new girlfriend) to the registry office . . .

items.title: S03E08 - Full Circle
items.summary: Sharon has a little secret. Unfortunately it is somewhat difficult to share with Eric when they are not even talking . . .

infolabels.title: Full Circle
infolabels.plot: Sharon has a little secret. Unfortunately it is somewhat difficult to share with Eric when they are not even talking . . .
